summary: Phase 6 mobile responsiveness + sidebar polish — all 17 frontend test scenarios PASS. Verified desktop sidebar collapse/expand with data-collapsed attr, width 260↔68 smooth transition, localStorage 'sidebar:collapsed' persistence (1/0) across page reload, justify-center on collapsed nav items, Radix tooltip on hover when collapsed, active-route bg-primary preserved when collapsed, main-content resizes by ~192px to match sidebar delta. Mobile (390px): desktop sidebar hidden (md:flex), mobile-menu-button visible, mobile-sidebar NOT in DOM until opened (Radix Dialog unmount), mobile-nav-* links navigate AND close drawer, Escape/overlay close works, RBAC enforced (AGENT sees no mobile-nav-users). Regression: admin & agent login, dashboard, leads table (with import/export + overflow-x-auto), users, communications, followups all accessible. Dashboard grids correctly stack to 1-col on mobile. No body horizontal overflow on /dashboard or /leads at 390px.
action_items: PRE-EXISTING (not Phase 6): /app/frontend/src/pages/LeadDetailPage.tsx has TS errors — missing useState for notesError/setNotesError (lines 84, 90, 261, 266, 284). Not introduced this iteration but should be cleaned up.
PRE-EXISTING (not Phase 6): /app/frontend/src/services/api.ts uses `import.meta.env` but tsconfig lacks Vite ImportMeta type — typescript errors at lines 4,5. Not Phase 6 related.
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.tsx: transition-[width] correctly used (NOT transition-all). justify-center applied when collapsed. whitespace-nowrap + overflow-hidden prevent label clipping. Tooltips conditionally mounted only when collapsed — clean approach.
MainLayout.tsx: lazy initializer pattern with readCollapsed() avoids hydration flash. localStorage write in useEffect on every collapsed change. Try/catch around storage access — robust.
MobileSidebar.tsx: Radix Sheet Dialog cleanly unmounts on close. Each MobileNavItem fires onNavigate (close) before NavLink default behavior — proper drawer dismissal.
nav-items.ts: clean shared NAV_ITEMS source with roles filter; both desktop and mobile sidebars reuse — DRY satisfied.
Phase 6 files contribute ZERO new TS errors; pre-existing errors in LeadDetailPage and api.ts are unrelated.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 is fully verified. data-testid for sidebar='sidebar' with data-collapsed='true|false'. Mobile drawer testid='mobile-sidebar', items 'mobile-nav-{label}' (lowercased, e.g. 'mobile-nav-follow-ups' uses dash form since label is 'Follow-ups' lowercased = 'follow-ups'). Desktop nav 'nav-{label}'. localStorage key 'sidebar:collapsed' value '1'=collapsed '0'=expanded. Verified using set_viewport_size 1440x900 (desktop) and 390x844 (mobile) with 500–700ms settle.
verified_features: reload persistence: data-collapsed stays 'true' after reload
collapsed UX: justify-center class, no text labels, tooltip on hover
main-content widens by 192px when sidebar collapses
mobile <768px: desktop sidebar hidden, mobile-menu-button visible
mobile drawer mounts on click, contains all nav items
AGENT mobile drawer does NOT show mobile-nav-users (RBAC)
mobile /dashboard: 0px body overflow, grids collapse to 1-col
mobile /leads: 0px body overflow, table wrapped in overflow-x-auto
